name: Runed Staff
rulesText:
Weapon
Melee • Blunt • Staff • Runed
1 Physical Damage
Requires Staff proficiency.
Hands Required: 2 Hands.
Traits: Arcane Implement: You may treat this weapon as an Arcane Focus. Runic Channeling: Once per combat, when you resolve an Arcana spell that deals damage, add +1 damage.

traits: Arcane Implement: You may treat this weapon as an Arcane Focus.
Runic Channeling: Once per combat, when you resolve an Arcana spell that deals damage, add +1 damage.

source.notes: Its once-per-combat trait should use the established equipment-use tracking method. The staff also serves as an Arcane Focus while equipped.
